UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user account and their personalized data, preferences, and engagement metrics within the Kaiwhakawānabe app.

shortId.description: Short unique ID for social sharing.

roopuName.description: The name of the user's custom kapa haka group for drafting.

profileImageUrl.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

likedPoints.description: Points earned for high-quality positive adjudication.

dislikedPoints.description: Points earned for high-quality critical/negative adjudication.

vibePoints.description: Points earned for silly, high-energy, or humorous commentary.

receivedHearts.description: Total hearts (Luv) received from the community.

lastHeartGivenAt.description: Timestamp of the last heart given to enforce 1-per-day rule.

hypedEventIds.description: List of event IDs the user has claimed hype shards for.

profileColor.description: Bebo-style theme color for the profile background.

customBackgroundImageUrl.description: URL for a custom roopu/hapu background image.

manaBackgroundEnabled.description: Whether to show the swirling Kowhaiwhai background pattern.

unlockedLegacyIds.description: List of legacy roopu IDs the user has purchased with mana.

purchasedMana.description: Total mana purchased through in-app transactions.

hasCompletedTutorial.description: Whether the user has finished the onboarding tour.

activePartyId.description: The ID of the party the user is currently participating in.

Poll.title: Poll
Poll.description: A weekly poll for iconic kapa haka items.

PollVote.title: PollVote
PollVote.description: A user's vote in an iconic poll.

Party.title: Party
Party.description: A group of users voting collectively on a performance.

delegations.description: Map of userId to array of assigned itemId strings

lockedItemIds.description: List of item IDs that have been globally locked in order

PartyMember.title: PartyMember
PartyMember.description: A user who has joined a judging party.

PartyMessage.title: PartyMessage
PartyMessage.description: A message sent within a private judging party.

PartyVote.title: PartyVote
PartyVote.description: A scorecard submitted by a party member with point delegation and top-3 ranking predictions.

delegatedPoints.description: Map of roopu ID to points given (Sum must be 100)

ranking.description: Top 3 roopu IDs in predicted order

/polls/{pollId}/votes/{userId}.description: Individual votes for the weekly poll.

/parties/{partyId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Private chat messages within a party.

/parties/{partyId}/votes/{userId}.description: Individual scorecards within a party for averaging.
